positive: A mesmerizing celestial tapestry featuring stylized constellations interwoven with geometric silhouettes of woodland animals (foxes, deer, owls). The style must be highly graphic, inspired by mid-century modern art and tattoo flash, using clean lines, solid vector shapes, and a strong, central composition. Utilize a limited, harmonious color palette of deep sapphire blue, muted gold, burnt orange, and creamy white. The design must have a high contrast 'cutout' feel, making it immediately visible and suitable for printing on dark fabric. Focus on clean negative space and repeating, elegant patterns that guide the eye to the central mythical assembly.
negative: blurry, low contrast, noisy, fuzzy, photorealistic, 3d render, text, words, logo, trademark, watermark, cropped, off-center, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, grain
